helpText.introduction: A short introduction of your Character. This part will shown on the Character's card and will not serve as Prompts
helpText.settings: This serves as the master Prompts, dictating "who" the character is and "how" they behave.We provide 5 expert templates. Simply choose a base archetype and tweak it to fit your needs.
helpText.greeting: The first message that the Character sent to the user.
helpText.personality: What turns them on? What ticks them off?
helpText.scenario: The context of the world. Are we in a cyberpunk city? A high school classroom? This grounds the AI in a specific time and place.
helpText.conversation: By writing out a few "User says / Character replies" examples, you teach the AI exactly how to react to specific keywords or emotional triggers.

posts.title: How we balance model performance with safety and compliance for creators
posts.summary: A closer look at the latest safeguards—from prompt filtering to on-device checks—and how they protect the community while keeping creative freedom.

posts.title: Faster character workflows: new pipelines to ship stories in hours, not days
posts.summary: We rebuilt the character creation toolchain with smarter defaults, reusable presets, and batch publishing so teams can ship episodic content at scale.

posts.title: Vision roadmap 2026: multimodal creation, live co-editing, and trust layers
posts.summary: What we are building next: collaborative editing, richer style controls, and trust signals to keep every generated asset verifiable and brand-safe.

blog.pageDesc: Errows is an AI role-play and story generator focused on creative freedom and controllability. In this blog we share behind-the-scenes work, reviews, and practical tutorials.
